description_long: This house features a classic Victorian-inspired design with a prominent round turret capped by a conical roof, and a steeply pitched gable roof covered in blue shingles. The exterior walls are clad in weathered white horizontal siding, giving it a slightly rustic appearance. A large wraparound porch with dark wooden flooring and railings extends from the front and side, providing a welcoming entry space. The windows are arranged in both single and paired configurations, with some featuring decorative trim and muntins. The house includes architectural details such as overhanging eaves, triangular gable pediments, and a mix of rectangular and arched window shapes. The overall structure is two stories tall, with the turret adding vertical emphasis and visual interest.
description: A two-story Victorian-style house with a blue shingled gable roof, round turret, weathered white siding, and a large wraparound porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gable, turret with conical roof, wraparound porch, and prominent windows with decorative trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full extent of the porch, the round turret, and the side gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with two large windows and the blue shingled roof, with less architectural detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the intersecting gables, turret roof, and minimal window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with paired and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered wraparound porch with wooden railings and steps, decorative trim, and a prominent overhang.
